- Player at the right side, near the green blocks

- 3 purple blocks at the bottom left (rows ~55-58, cols ~13-29)
- 2 green blocks at the top center (rows ~1-9, cols ~37-41)

Let me check the current state more carefully.

<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state after big transformation
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("Current objects:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] not in ('B', 'G'):
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
